name: humation
description: Humation - avatar engine and official asset packages

scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/assets-humation-1 build && bun run --cwd packages/react build && bun run --cwd packages/web-component build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/assets-humation-1 typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/react typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/web-component typecheck && bun run --cwd examples/node typecheck
scripts.test: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/assets-humation-1 test && bun run --cwd packages/react test && bun run --cwd packages/web-component test && bun run example:node
